backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Punjabi Bites backend, managing menu items (CRUD, availability toggle) and UPI payment settings with admin-only access control and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a single feature fix: correcting UPI payment deep links in UpiPaymentButtons.tsx and UpiPaymentOptionsModal.tsx to use proper app-specific URI schemes for GPay, PhonePe, and Paytm.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summary of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key behaviors of each component, page, hook, and context in the React frontend.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, including colors, radius, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite app, setting the page title to 'Punjabi Bites – Authentic Punjabi Cuisine' and mounting the React app at the #root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with three routes (/, /admin, /payment), wraps the app in CartProvider, QueryClientProvider, ErrorBoundary, and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Full-page access denied UI shown to non-admin users, offering login via Internet Identity and a back-to-menu navigation button.
frontend/src/components/CartSidebar.tsx: Sliding cart sidebar with item management controls that routes to /payment on desktop or shows a UPI payment modal on mobile, clearing the cart on payment confirmation.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: React class-based error boundary that catches rendering errors and displays a branded fallback UI with a reload button.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer displaying the restaurant name, copyright year, and a caffeine.ai attribution link with UTM tracking parameters.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky navigation header with logo, login/logout via Internet Identity, and an admin panel button shown conditionally based on the user's admin status.
frontend/src/components/icons/PaymentApp: SVG icon components for GPay, PhonePe, and Paytm with configurable size and className props.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Simple page layout wrapper that composes Header, a flex-growing main content area, and Footer.
frontend/src/components/MenuItemCard.tsx: Card component displaying a menu item's image, name, price, category badge, and add/remove-from-cart controls with quantity tracking.
frontend/src/components/MenuItemForm.tsx: React Hook Form-based form for creating or editing a menu item, with fields for name, description, price, category, and image URL.
frontend/src/components/PresetImagePicke: Intentionally empty placeholder component not used in Version 2.
frontend/src/components/UpiPaymentButton: Renders three UPI payment buttons (GPay, PhonePe, Paytm) that build app-specific deep links and open them with an iOS App Store fallback.
frontend/src/components/UpiPaymentOption: Modal dialog presenting GPay, PhonePe, and Paytm UPI payment options with deep links, plus a payment confirmation button after the user initiates payment.
frontend/src/contexts/CartContext.tsx: Defines a React context and provider for shopping cart state, exposing methods to add, remove, update, and clear items along with computed totals.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes React Query hooks for all backend operations including menu item CRUD, availability toggling, admin checks, and UPI settings management.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for a warm Punjabi Bites color palette in both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin dashboard page for managing menu items (add, edit, delete, toggle availability) and UPI payment settings, with access control guarding the UI.
frontend/src/pages/MenuDisplay.tsx: Public-facing menu page that fetches and displays menu items grouped by category with a hero banner, loading/error states, and an integrated cart sidebar.
frontend/src/pages/OrderReceiptPage.tsx: Page component for displaying an order receipt after checkout (content truncated/empty in provided source).
frontend/src/pages/PaymentPage.tsx: React page component that displays an order summary and UPI payment options, fetching UPI settings and handling payment confirmation by clearing the cart and navigating home.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read, persist, and clear URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, using sessionStorage for cross-navigation persistence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a custom Indian-restaurant brand palette (saffron, deepRed, cream, spice), display/sans font families, and accordion animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for 'Punjabi Bites' tracking a known bug where UPI payment buttons incorrectly open WhatsApp instead of GPay/PhonePe/Paytm, with the fix targeting correct platform-specific URI schemes.
